# x2q

> x2q is a personal blog with notes on software, Linux, networking, payments, home labs, cooking, and the odd side project. Online since 2010.

Site URL: https://www.x2q.net
Author: X2Q
Language: English
License: Content © x2q. Quote freely with attribution and a link back.

## About

- Single-author personal blog, online since 2010.
- Topics: tech (Linux, Debian, Ubuntu, MariaDB, caching, networking, payments/BIN lists), home labs, and food.
- No ads, no third-party trackers beyond Cloudflare Web Analytics, no cookies.

## Contact

- Email: x2q [at] x2q [dot] net
- RSS: https://www.x2q.net/index.xml
- Sitemap: https://www.x2q.net/sitemap.xml

## Crawling

- All common AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, CCBot) are allowed per robots.txt.
- Please respect a reasonable crawl rate.
